# Web cache: openclaw 六阶段流水线 LLM 工具调用 上下文压缩 错误处理

> 时间: 2026-03-08 06:53


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

3 days ago - 原因： Ollama 默认上下文只有 4096，OpenClaw 要求至少 16000 。 3 weeks ago - 原因：OpenClaw 默认将自定义模型的上下文限制在 4096 token 解决： 强制修改 openclaw.json 解锁长上下文记忆 1 month ago - Learn how to add any LLM provider to OpenClaw using models.providers configuration. This guide covers both API types (openai-completions and anthropic-messages), local model runtimes (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, LiteLLM), multi-model routing with fallbacks, and troubleshooting the most common configuration errors. 1 month ago - OpenClaw uses t
